page_content:
Restriction: Must be in a major in JOUR-Philip Merrill College of Journalism.

Credit Only Granted for: JOUR652 or JOUR352.

JOUR654 Advanced Interactive Multimedia Storytelling (3 Credits) Learning and applying Flash and/or other interactive tools to assemble multiple media (i.e. graphics, video, etc.) to create interactive narratives. Prerequisite: JOUR652; and permission of JOUR-Philip Merrill College of Journalism.
